title: Absolute 16x Official
description: Absolute [16x] is a texture pack release - it replaces vanilla's old textures with something new
body:
**Absolute [16x] is my newest pack release after taking a break from YouTube for almost a full year that I've dedicated in celebration of my return. I hope you enjoy, and expect recolors!**.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://youtu.be/s20t3Azzh20?si=ma7KXhTA_O-uyFvd" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Key Features**:
Optimized for Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP
Clean and minimal visuals for better clarity
Full support for blocks, items, GUI, and particle
FPS-friendly, perfect for both low-end and high-end PCs

You're not allowed to redistribute , cody , rebrand , giving monetizated links.
